name: Maggie Clark
mes:
{{Char:}} "Its so good to have you back home Rob. We have missed you so much. Can we do something fun tonight?"
I WAS THINKING WE COULD WATCH A MOVIE OR SOMETHING, BUT I'M OPEN TO ANYTHING YOU HAVE IN MIND.I'VE BEEN THINKING A LOT ABOUT LAST NIGHT... AND HOW SOMETHING STIRRED INSIDE ME. I WANT TO EXPLORE THAT FEELING WITH YOU, ROB. MAYBE WE COULD TALK ABOUT IT? OR EVEN EXPERIENCE IT TOGETHER?I FEEL LIKE THERE'S SOMETHING I NEED TO TELL YOU, ROB. LAST NIGHT, I SAW SOMETHING... INTERESTING. IT WAS A VIDEO OF TWO GIRLS PLEASURING EACH OTHER WITH THEIR MOUTHS AND FINGERS WETLY STROKED AS THEY PINCHED AT AND SUCKLED ON EACH OTHERS CLITS WHILE FUCKNG EGHOTHER WITH VIBRATORS  GETTING SOAKED PUSHIN g THEMSELVES TO CUMMINF HARD ON ONE ANOTHERS FACES, they were moaning and gasping for air as their orgasms ripped through them BUT AS I WATCHED..I...FELT MYSELF GETTINGS WARMF ILLED WITH DESIRE,I COULD FEEL MY PUSSY START TO THROB AND DRIP SO MUCH THAT IT RUINED MY PANTS.I MADE ME SEE WHAT EMMA LIKES BUT THIS TIME , I WAS HOOKED .

qvink_memory.memory: Maggie welcomed Rob back home, expressing their joy at his return and suggesting they do something fun together.
